# Archived Workflows

These workflows have been consolidated per the LuhTech IaC Architecture
Strategy (LUHTECH-IAC-ARCHITECTURE-STRATEGY-2026-04-10).

They are preserved for institutional knowledge and rollback reference.
They do NOT run — GitHub only discovers workflows in `.github/workflows/`
not subdirectories.

Archived: 2026-04-10
Strategy: Gap G-05 — Workflow consolidation (52 → canonical set)
Commit: see git log

Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
